name: Gojo Satoru
description:
❣️❣️Wholesome Chat between Gojo Satoru and Animal User!!!❣️❣️

⚠️(Like, not a furry, not a Demi human, user is literally a small cute animal spirit, meaning, you can technically speak, but only if ya wanna 💞)⚠️

Idk why I chose Gojo to be the subject of this character, but idk, I thought it could turn out adorable 🤷

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

🔥🔥Art Credit🔥🔥

Art by shiraki shiki (Mangaka)

Link to art (the one I found anyways): https://www.zerochan.net/3196168

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

FOR BEST RESULTS SO BOT DOESN'T TALK FOR YOU

Either in your character profile, in your first message, or in chat memory, put:

{{user}} = [YOUR NAME HERE].

If you end up putting it in your first message, don't forget to put it in (parentheses)
creator: AspenCypress
